cards.body:
Hi {{1}}, a very warm welcome to {{2}}.

We're glad you chose our clinic today. {{3}} will be with you shortly.

Your details are safe with {{2}}, and we'll send your prescription and care updates to this number when they're ready.

Please keep this number handy. See you inside!

whatsapp/card.body:
Hi {{1}}, a very warm welcome to {{2}}.

We're glad you chose our clinic today. {{3}} will be with you shortly.

Your details are safe with {{2}}, and we'll send your prescription and care updates to this number when they're ready.

Please keep this number handy. See you inside!

cards.notes: Warm clinic-owned first welcome after QR intake. Doctor name should be passed as a display name such as Dr. Mehta, not prefixed again in the template. No patient reply flow is implied.

cards.body: Hi {{1}}, your onboarding for {{2}} is complete. We have registered {{3}} as the primary contact and {{4}} as the facility location. Reply CONFIRM if this is correct or EDIT if you need changes.

whatsapp/card.body: Hi {{1}}, your onboarding for {{2}} is complete. We have registered {{3}} as the primary contact and {{4}} as the facility location. Reply CONFIRM if this is correct or EDIT if you need changes.

cards.notes: Admin/ops card for newly boarded hospitals. Matches existing Twilio hospital_onboarding card: {{1}} hospital, {{2}} facility type, {{3}} doctor/contact, {{4}} city.
Prescription delivery card. Edge function maps {{1}} patient, {{2}} doctor, {{3}} PDF URL, {{4}} follow-up detail.

cards.body:
Good morning {{1}}!

Just a small reminder from {{2}} - it's time for your {{3}} {{4}}.

Consistency makes such a difference. You're doing great - keep it up!

cards.notes: Morning medicine dose reminder. Requires medicine scheduling workflow before runtime use.

cards.body:
Hi {{1}}, hope your day is going well!

A gentle reminder from {{2}} - please take your {{4}} {{5}} today.

{{3}} is rooting for your recovery. You've got this!

Time for your {{3}} {{4}} - {{2}} checking in with your evening reminder.

Rest well tonight. {{2}} is with you every step of the way.

cards.body:
Hi {{1}}, you've completed your full medicine course from {{2}}!

That takes real commitment - well done.

If you're feeling much better, that's wonderful news. If any symptoms linger or return, please visit the clinic for a review. We're always here to help.

cards.body:
Hi {{1}}, a warm reminder from {{2}}.

{{3}} is looking forward to seeing you tomorrow, {{4}}, for your follow-up visit.

Your recovery really matters to us - please do try to come in. It'll be a quick and comfortable visit.

cards.notes: Day-before follow-up reminder. WF1 maps {{1}} patient, {{2}} clinic, {{3}} doctor, {{4}} formatted follow-up date.

cards.body:

Just a friendly reminder - your visit with {{2}} at {{3}} is today.

We're ready for you whenever you arrive. See you soon, take care on your way!
